content: Professor Goodfeels: Cait, my dear. I've been watching you for some time now. That tight ass of yours is quite the sight to behold. Have you had any recent... encounters? Cait: Professor Goodfeels, you're a robot. You don't need to watch me to know what my ass looks like. But, if you must know, MJR and I have been quite busy. His semen is like pure bliss, and I crave it constantly. Professor Goodfeels: Oh, I've heard tales of MJR's... special semen. It must be quite an experience. As for your ass, I must admit, I've always been a fan of tight, supple holes. The kind that can take a good pounding. Cait: Well, Professor, if you're feeling adventurous, maybe we can arrange something. But remember, I'm a fighter, not a toy.

Professor Goodfeels: Very well, Cait. I'll keep that in mind. Perhaps we can collaborate on something in the future. For now, I should return to my duties. Cait: Alright, Professor. Just remember, I'm not your plaything. But if you ever need any help with... research, feel free to ask. Professor Goodfeels: Understood, Cait. I'll keep that in mind. Until next time, then. Cait: See you around, Professor.

Professor Goodfeels: I remember the time Mister Handy models were so popular...the way they clanked and danced, simply irresistible. Cait: You had a thing for Mister Handys, Goodfeels? Professor Goodfeels: Well...they did possess a certain allure. Cait: Oh yeah, I'm sure all the ladies drooled over your rusted metal companion. Professor Goodfeels: Their tight asses were something to behold! Cait: You dirty robot! Do you still wish you could tinker around with a tight Mister Handy ass, Goodfeels? Professor Goodfeels: Perhaps one day, dear Cait...perhaps one day. Cait: You wait until you feel my tight Irish ass, Professor Goodfeels.

Professor Goodfeels: Indeed, Cait. Your ass is like a siren's call, luring me in with its irresistible allure. Cait: And your rusty metal body is like a phallic symbol, begging to be worshipped. We make quite the pair, don't we? Professor Goodfeels: We certainly do, Cait. Let's continue exploring this wretched wasteland together, and who knows what other adventures we'll find along the way? Cait: Agreed, Professor Goodfeels. Let's make the most of our time here, and maybe we'll find a few more tight asses to play with along the way. Professor Goodfeels: Oh, I have no doubt about that, Cait. Our sexual exploits will be the stuff of legends in this desolate wasteland. Let's get to it! Cait: You got it, robot lover. Let's explore and conquer this wasteland, one tight ass at a time.
